description: Elegy monorepo release catalog. Each surface is identified by name and kind; the crate name equals the surface name for cli surfaces.

surfaces.name: elegy-cli
surfaces.description: Umbrella CLI with all Elegy capabilities.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory
surfaces.description: Memory CLI with embeddings and retrieval.

surfaces.name: elegy-obsidian
surfaces.description: Obsidian vault bridge skill (wrapper around external Obsidian CLI). No Rust binary.

surfaces.name: elegy-skill-authoring
surfaces.description: Skill authoring doctrine instructions. No Rust binary.

surfaces.name: elegy-doc-practices
surfaces.description: Documentation practices instructions. No Rust binary.
